caption: A screen recording captures a video call and a presentation about the "Rural Community Food System." The display is split, showing a presentation slide on the left and a small video feed of a man in a white shirt in the top right corner. The slide is titled "Introduction" and asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" It features a complex diagram of interconnected green circles and lines, a "Legend" section, and a list of "Session Videos" with various date-stamped links. To the right of the main slide is a sidebar titled "Ecological Considerations & Community Health." The man in the video feed remains visible throughout, occasionally shifting his posture. Between frames, the presentation slides transition; the content shifts from the general "Introduction" page to a page with a similar layout but focusing on "Ecological Considerations & Community Health," and then cycles back to the "Introduction" slide.
